series_metadata.series_title: Real Property Tax Reduction Factor Reports
series_metadata.series_description: These reports contain the mathematical calculations for real property tax reduction factors required by Ohio statutes. These reports have two or more separate tables of data and calculations: Table "A"; Table "B"; School District Minimum Rate Guarantee Calculations; Joint Vocational School Minimum Gurantee Calculations; Table "C".

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Paper: Reports are be retained on paper medium ; Microform: 1994 and prior this information is maintained on microfilm and is kept permanently ; Electronic: 1995 these reports have been imaged and archived in computer system
retention_rules.disposition_method: Paper: Shred ; Microform: Permanent ; Electronic: Permanent
